author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls - Captain America Character Guide | PS5 & PC Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/marvel-tokon-fighting-souls/

Welcome to Character Guides, a video series designed to help you master the heroes and villains of MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls.
Each guide breaks down normal attacks, unique skills, and core tools so you can sharpen your play and dominate the battle.

We begin with Captain America, covering his mid-air attacks, anti-airs, Vibranium Shield counters, Ricochet Volley, and more. 
Bring justice to every fight!

MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls is coming to PS5 and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!
 
© 2026 MARVEL 
©2026 Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc. 
Developed by ARC SYSTEM WORKS CO., LTD.
 
#ps5 #ps5games #marveltokon #fightingavengers

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Alchemist: Journey of the Soul - Launch Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10015499

First-person adventure game, playable solo or co-op with up to 4 people. Travel through unique areas, uncover memories and use them to craft powerful potions. Unlock special abilities and solve puzzles in a mysterious world. Will your soul survive this journey?

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games
